failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
    p.id AS profile_id,
    p.username,
    COUNT(c.id) AS comment_count
FROM profile p
JOIN publication pub ON p.id = pub.profile_id
JOIN comment c ON pub.id = c.publication_id
WHERE (p.biography ILIKE '%steakhouse%' OR p.biography ILIKE '%churrascaria%')
  AND (p.biography ILIKE '%Curitiba%')
GROUP BY p.id, p.username
ORDER BY comment_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error: Query executed successfully but returned 0 rows — the filter may be too restrictive. Consider: OR instead of AND between separate concepts, dropping an overly specific constraint, or a broader tsquery.

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
    p.id AS profile_id,
    p.username,
    COUNT(c.id) AS comment_count
FROM profile p
JOIN publication pub ON p.id = pub.profile_id
JOIN comment c ON pub.id = c.publication_id
WHERE (p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('portuguese', 'steakhouse | churrascaria | curitiba'))
GROUP BY p.id, p.username
ORDER BY comment_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
